arts.ttl: Frustrated Chelsea star could be one to watch for transfer exit after lack of minutes
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Joao Felix could reportedly be one worth watching out for in the months ahead as he’s said to be frustrated with his lack of playing time. That’s according to journalist Simon Phillips via Substack, with Felix struggling to play as frequently in his second spell at Stamford Bridge. arts.ttl: Player seduces Chelsea, Blues ‘decide to take action’ to sign him – Club favour January exit
arts.sum: Chelsea have become the latest club to join the race to sign Paris Saint-Germain’s Randal Kolo Muani in the winter market, according to Foot Mercato. The forward has scored two goals and registered an assist from 14 games this season and four appearances in the past two months.
